title: wylia iberica
intro: Wylia iberica, also known as Spanish valerian or Iberian valerian, is a perennial plant belonging to the Valerianaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its sedative and antispasmodic effects, attributed to its valerenic acid and valeranone compounds. The health benefits of Wylia iberica include relief from insomnia, anxiety, and muscle spasms, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve sleep quality. Wylia iberica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
